'''nathudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fogeyism|fogeyism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fogeyism|fogeyism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nathudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næthidith|næthidith]] || [[word:næthidij|næthidij]] || [[word:næthidish|næthidish]] || [[word:næthidi|næthidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathuthuduth|nathuthuduth]] || [[word:nathuthuduj|nathuthuduj]] || [[word:nathuthudush|nathuthudush]] || [[word:nathuthudu|nathuthudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nathuduth|nathuduth]] || [[word:nathuduj|nathuduj]] || [[word:nathudush|nathudush]] || [[word:nathudu|nathudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathufduth|nathufduth]] || [[word:nathufduj|nathufduj]] || [[word:nathufdush|nathufdush]] || [[word:nathufduf|nathufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nathuduthu|nathuduthu]] || [[word:nathuduju|nathuduju]] || [[word:nathudushu|nathudushu]] || [[word:nathuduku|nathuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nathuduth|nathuduth]] || [[word:nathuduj|nathuduj]] || [[word:nathudush|nathudush]] || [[word:nathudu|nathudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nathuduthul|nathuduthul]] || [[word:nathudujul|nathudujul]] || [[word:nathudushul|nathudushul]] || [[word:nathudukul|nathudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nathuduthuthu|nathuduthuthu]] || [[word:nathudujuju|nathudujuju]] || [[word:nathudushushu|nathudushushu]] || [[word:nathuduku|nathuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nathuduthun|nathuduthun]] || [[word:nathudujun|nathudujun]] || [[word:nathudushun|nathudushun]] || [[word:nathudukun|nathudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nathuduthuoro|nathuduthuoro]] || [[word:nathudujuoro|nathudujuoro]] || [[word:nathudushuoro|nathudushuoro]] || [[word:nathudukuoro|nathudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
